Notes: 2007 NCAA Division III Women's Basketball Championship Sectional Finals.
NYU advances to Final Four for third time in program history, and for the
first time since 1997 when it won the Division III National Championship.
Game.Officials: Daniel Martin,  Jerome Skrine,  Lee French
